market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low. Positive total GEX across all expiries indicates market makers will actively suppress volatility and pin the spot price.
outlook.summary: Market is trapped in a high positive gamma environment with massive Call open interest exactly at the spot price. Expect mean-reversion, tight range trading, and strong pinning around 675. Flat skew confirms a neutral stance, while elevated Put/Call ratios are comfortably absorbed by dealers who are long gamma.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI and volume across all three expirations. Exact ATM strike acting as a supreme pinning level due to heavily positive GEX.
Ultimate Put Wall in Weekly (16.4k OI) and Monthly (37.3k OI). Heavy put volume indicates strong institutional defense against deeper downside.
Major Call Wall in both 0DTE (24.3k OI) and Monthly (24.9k OI) expirations. Caps immediate upside momentum.
Significant Put OI in 0DTE (15.8k) combined with massive Call OI in Monthly (34.7k), creating a strong structural pivot and high friction zone.
Monthly Gamma Flip level. Positive GEX above this point reinforces structural stability; a drop below could trigger accelerated negative gamma selling.
0DTE Max Pain level at 650.0, heavily confluent with massive Put OI (22.8k) acting as a gravitational pull lower if spot loses the gamma flip.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are temporary resistance (breakout likely). Put walls are strong support. Gamma flip acts as dynamic support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to heavily positive dealer gamma
outlook.summary: The market is characterized by a massive positive GEX across all expirations, indicating dealers are heavily long gamma. This suppresses volatility and creates a stable, mean-reverting environment. Short-term sentiment shows extreme put hedging (0DTE PCR 3.22) while monthly is call-heavy (PCR 0.55). Spot is trading near psychological resistance.

levels.motivazione: Major psychological strike with extreme Call volume (1003) and high OI in 0DTE. Acts as a primary short-term resistance.
Significant 0DTE Call Open Interest and high volume indicating a secondary resistance level above the immediate psychological 28000 strike.
Significant Call OI in both WEEKLY (84) and MONTHLY (205) expirations. Represents a strong upper boundary in the current positive GEX environment.
Massive Put volume (683) and OI (82) in 0DTE. Unusual activity creates a strong structural floor for the current session.
Highest 0DTE Call OI (228) combined with massive volume (1082 at 27700). Spot is hovering just above this level, making it an active attraction zone.
0DTE Max Pain, high 0DTE Put OI (144), and massive MONTHLY Call OI (3763). Represents the ultimate structural floor for the current cycle.
